# ADR-0003: Pending

> State: Proposed

## Status

Proposed

## Stakeholders

_Who owns this decision, and who needs to sign off? List the roles or people involved._

## Context and Problem Statement

_What situation is forcing a decision? Describe the problem and the forces at play — technical constraints, business goals, team context — and why it has to be settled now._

## Decision Drivers

_What should drive the choice? List the requirements and constraints that matter — a quality attribute, a deadline, a cost ceiling, a compatibility need. One per line._

## Considered Options

_List the options you actually weighed — at least two, including the one(s) you rejected — so the trade-off is on the record._

## Decision Outcome

_Name the chosen option and the core reason in one line ("Chosen: **X**, because …"), then explain how it answers the drivers above._

### Positive Consequences

_What gets better, easier, or safer as a result?_

### Negative Consequences

_What gets worse, harder, or riskier? Every decision has trade-offs — name them honestly, including any new debt or follow-up this creates._

## Implementation

_How will the decision be carried out — rollout, migration, the follow-up tasks? Optional: draft it later with `adroit plan`, or delete this section if it doesn't apply._
